title: The Hartford Names David DeSilva Head Of Construction
text: HARTFORD, Conn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The Hartford promoted David DeSilva to head of Construction for Middle and Large Commercial. In this role, DeSilva is responsible for overseeing the vision, strategy, growth, and profitability of the company's retail construction portfolio. text: The Hartford Financial Services Group, Inc. is well-positioned with its strong P/C segment. Its stellar Balance Sheet may help it keep up with massive changes in the market.
